title: Daoist Canon: Daodejing (with Heshang Gong commentary) (Section 2)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Daodejing (with Heshang Gong commentary)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Daodejing (with Heshang Gong commentary)

translation.text: From the Daodejing (with Heshang Gong commentary) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
